data.title: Kaisar Network Secures $4 Million in Funding for Decentralized AI Platform
data.description: Kaisar Network, a decentralized AI computing Layer 1 network, has announced the completion of a $4 million funding round. According to ChainCatcher, $1 million of this amount was raised during a strategic pre-seed round. The network, incubated by Outlier Ventures and Borderless Capital, plans to launch Token AI, which will enable users to access decentralized GPU computing, AI credits, and proxy services.

data.title: SBI Holdings plans to bring bitbank into its controlling subsidiary through a capital business partnership.
data.description: SBI Holdings announced that it will officially launch negotiations for a capital and business cooperation agreement with bitbank operator bitbank Inc. on May 1, 2026. SBI Holdings stated that the cooperation aims to acquire a stake in bitbank, making it a merged subsidiary. The specific acquisition percentage and timing will be determined after due diligence. Bitbank had planned to list on the Tokyo Stock Exchange by mid-2025 and boasts an industry-leading security record. If the transaction is completed, the SBI Group will integrate its various major exchanges, including SBI VC Trade, BITPoint Japan, and bitbank, becoming Japan's largest cryptocurrency platform group. (CoinPost)

data.title: Bitmine Pledges 162,000 ETH Amid Scrutiny on Tether and Related Loans
data.description: Bitmine has announced a pledge of 162,000 ETH, estimated to be worth approximately $366 million. According to NS3.AI, this move comes as U.S. Senator Elizabeth Warren and other lawmakers raise concerns about Tether and Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick regarding related-party loans. The scrutiny reflects ongoing regulatory attention in the cryptocurrency sector, focusing on transparency and financial practices.

data.title: Binance to Launch Alpha Airdrop and Trading Event
data.description: Binance announced on X that users should prepare for the Alpha airdrop and trading event scheduled for today at 15:00 (UTC+8). Participants with a minimum of 237 Binance Alpha Points are eligible to claim the token airdrop. The distribution will operate on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is fully claimed or the event concludes. Further details regarding the airdrop will be announced separately.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Resistance Amid Weak Spot Demand and Leverage
data.description: Bitcoin recently reached a price of $77,400, encountering potential resistance due to over $130 million in asks positioned between $76,700 and $79,300. According to NS3.AI, the analysis indicates that recent rallies have been short-lived, primarily due to weak spot demand and insufficient long leverage in the market.

data.title: Planet Midday News
data.description: 1. A suspected Multicoin address holds $26.9 million in HYPE, with a floating profit of approximately $10.5 million; 2. US Senators including Warren questioned Tether and Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick about related-party lending issues; 3. Bitmine pledged another 162,000 ETH, worth approximately $366 million; 4. Hundreds of ETH mainnet wallets are suspected of being attacked by the same address, some of which have been inactive for over 7 years, possibly related to LastPass security notes; 5. The US Congress is divided on whether the war with Iran should trigger the 60-day deadline of the War Powers Act.

data.title: Tokenized Gold Trading Volume Surpasses 2025 Total in Q1
data.description: Tokenized gold spot trading volume reached $90.7 billion in the first quarter, surpassing the $84.6 billion recorded throughout 2025, according to NS3.AI. CoinGecko reported that centralized exchanges facilitated the majority of this trading activity. The growth in commodity-based real-world assets was primarily driven by PAXG and XAUT, which accounted for 89.1% of the increase.

data.title: Bitmine Increases Ethereum Stake with Additional 162,088 ETH
data.description: Bitmine has expanded its Ethereum holdings by staking an additional 162,088 ETH, valued at $366 million. According to NS3.AI, this move brings the company's total staked Ethereum to 4,194,029 ETH. The increase in staked assets reflects Bitmine's ongoing commitment to the Ethereum network and its strategic positioning within the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: RBC Raises AMD Target Price to $325
data.description: The Royal Bank of Canada has increased its target price for AMD (AMD.O) from $230 to $325. According to Jin10, this adjustment reflects the bank's updated outlook on AMD's market performance and potential growth.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Dr. Xiao Feng Discusses Privacy Computing and Blockchain Integration
data.description: Dr. Xiao Feng highlighted the capabilities of privacy computing, emphasizing its ability to make data usable without being visible. According to PANews, he stated that the true breakthrough lies in combining blockchain technology, which transforms data into callable, automatically billed AI tokens, unlocking commercial value without the need for permission.

data.title: Polymarket Introduces New Market on Epstein's Will Disclosure
data.description:
A new market has been launched on Polymarket regarding the disclosure of Jeffrey Epstein's will. According to Odaily, the market's settlement rules state that if any letter or written message by Epstein, intended as a will, is publicly disclosed before 11:59 PM Eastern Time on the specified deadline, the market outcome will be determined as 'Yes'; otherwise, it will be 'No'.

For a document to be recognized as Epstein's will, it must be confirmed by credible reports as being handwritten by him and must qualify as a will, final words, or a statement of similar nature.

data.title: Polymarket has a new listing for "When will Epstein's suicide note be released?"
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that Polymarket has added a new prediction market, "When will Epstein's will be released?". The market's settlement rules state that if any letter or written message written by Jeffrey Epstein and intended as a will is publicly disclosed before the deadline of 11:59 PM ET, the prediction market result will be "Yes"; otherwise, it will be "No." A will that meets the criteria must be credibly reported as being handwritten by Jeffrey Epstein and must be a will, a dying wish, or a written statement of equivalent nature. Odaily Seer continuously monitors prediction markets, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Gate DEX BountyDrop is now available for RealGo airdrops.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate DEX's BountyDrop has launched a RealGo airdrop event. Users can participate in tasks through the BountyDrop module on the Gate DEX App's "Events" page. 1,000 participants will be randomly selected from all those who complete the tasks to share 2,000,000 loyalty points. Gate Wallet is a multi-chain crypto wallet that connects 100+ public chains, millions of assets, and tens of thousands of DApps, providing a professional-grade DEX experience and optimal solutions for every DEX need. BountyDrop is a dedicated earning activity section on the Gate DEX Discover page, where users can complete simple tasks for a chance to earn rewards or participate in a lottery to receive airdropped tokens.

data.title: Crypto Cards Experience Surge in Payment Infrastructure
data.description: Justin Sun has highlighted the growing significance of crypto cards in the payment infrastructure, noting a substantial increase in their usage. According to NS3.AI, market data indicates that the volume of transactions involving crypto cards has surged approximately 500% since September 2024, reaching $600 million per month. Sun emphasized that stablecoins have already become part of daily payments and stressed the need for further integration with existing payment systems.

data.title: North Korean Hackers Allegedly Stole Over $6 Billion in Cryptocurrency Since 2017
data.description:
Foresight News posted on X (formerly Twitter) that North Korean hackers have reportedly stolen more than $6 billion in cryptocurrency since 2017, according to a recent report by TRM Labs. In April, these hackers allegedly took nearly $600 million in digital assets during attacks on Drift Protocol and Kelp DAO, accounting for 76% of the total losses for the month.

The report highlights a significant increase in the share of global cryptocurrency hacking losses attributed to North Korean hackers. This share has grown from less than 10% in 2020 and 2021 to 22% in 2022, 37% in 2023, 39% in 2024, and is projected to reach 64% in 2025.

data.title: Sky Expands Amid Aave's Kelp DAO Controversy
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). Amid the ongoing controversy surrounding Aave and the Kelp DAO theft, Sky is making significant strides in the market. Sky is implementing a strategic plan to solidify its position. Internally, it has established a policy to permanently lock 20% of its operational expenses, ensuring that at least 80% of net income is retained within the protocol. Externally, Sky has launched Laniakea, targeting the $300 billion stablecoin market's idle funds. This marks a significant transformation for Sky, evolving from a 'lender' to an on-chain institutional capital operating system.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Chinese Gold Jewelry Prices Rise Slightly
data.description: On May 1, Jin10 reported that the prices of gold jewelry in China have seen a slight increase compared to the previous day. Several brands have raised their prices by 9 yuan per gram, with most quotes ranging from 1,414 yuan per gram to 1,419 yuan per gram.

data.title: Key Web3 Events Scheduled for May 2026
data.description:
PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter) that several significant events are set to take place in May 2026, impacting the Web3 and crypto sectors. On May 1, Apple will hold its earnings call, and the Solana Foundation will implement a new validator delegation program. The Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME) plans to launch AVAX and Sui futures contracts on May 4. 

The U.S. April non-farm payroll data will be released on May 8, followed by a Senate vote on Kevin Warsh's appointment on May 11. The U.S. April Consumer Price Index (CPI) data is scheduled for release on May 12. Additionally, the Federal Reserve's monetary policy meeting minutes will be published on May 21. 

On May 29, the CME will initiate 24/7 trading support for crypto futures and options. These macroeconomic, regulatory, and industry activities are expected to further heat up the crypto market in May. PANews has introduced a new crypto calendar that offers comprehensive coverage, flexible filtering, and easy export options.

data.title: Debate Over War Powers Act Deadline for Military Action
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump faces scrutiny over the 60-day deadline set by the 1973 War Powers Act for military actions without congressional approval. According to Odaily, some lawmakers argue that May 1 marks the deadline, as Trump notified Congress of hostilities on March 2. However, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth claims the current ceasefire pauses the 60-day countdown.

Senator Adam Schiff disagrees, stating that the ceasefire does not halt the clock and argues the military action was illegal from the start due to the absence of an imminent threat. Meanwhile, Republican Senator Lisa Murkowski warns that if the White House fails to present a credible plan next week, a proposal for an Authorization for Use of Military Force (AUMF) will be introduced to uphold Congress's constitutional oversight role. It remains uncertain whether Trump will seek an additional 30-day extension allowed by the act.

data.title: Sky Enhances Governance with Laniakea Infrastructure Targeting Idle Stablecoins
data.description: Sky has announced the launch of its institutional-grade infrastructure, Laniakea, as part of its governance reform efforts. According to PANews, this initiative aims to tap into the $300 billion worth of idle stablecoins, intensifying competition in the DeFi infrastructure sector. The move is seen as a strategic step to leverage the vast amount of unused stablecoins in the decentralized finance space, potentially reshaping the landscape of DeFi infrastructure.
